gauge.name: Gros Ventre River at Kelly

impacts.statement: Flooding of low lying areas increases and becomes more widespread.  Highway 89 pathway is totally inundated with water. Water may begin to flow through Gros Ventre Campground sites that are near the river. River begins undercutting the Gros Ventre Road.
Flood stage. Flooding of low lying areas. Highway 89 pathway begins to flood.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
